citations: LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript
payload.reason: The proposal is an entire 8000-word transcript rather than a durable, distilled memory. It is too verbose and unstructured for storage as a memory card, and the input does not identify a specific stable fact worth retaining.
